request.description:
### Login Endpoint

This API endpoint allows the user to log in by providing the required credentials.

#### Request Body

- **email** (text) - The email address of the user.
    

#### Response

- **status** - Indicates the status of the request.
    
- **message** - A message related to the request status.
    
- **code** - The status code of the response.
    
- **token_type** - The type of token received.
    
- **token** - The authentication token.
    
- **expires_in** - The expiration time of the token.
    
- **data** - Additional user data including id, name, email, phone, address, longitude, latitude, avatar, role, status, is_new, available, gender, and balance.
    

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Login successful",
    "code": 200,
    "token_type": "bearer",
    "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJodHRwczovL3dlZ293b2xmLmNvbS9hcGkvbG9naW4iLCJpYXQiOjE3MzU5OTMxNjgsIm5iZiI6MTczNTk5MzE2OCwianRpIjoiZWdDM01VR0VhblNKTVhlOCIsInN1YiI6IjIiLCJwcnYiOiIyM2JkNWM4OTQ5ZjYwMGFkYjM5ZTcwMWM0MDA4NzJkYjdhNTk3NmY3In0.HPzG1VLPQDZXx-OHpfAC2fUQI9aQ8m94-ufZZMPojpA",
    "expires_in": 0,
    "data": {
        "id": 2,
        "name": "User",
        "email": "user@user.com",
        "phone": "018895522",
        "address": null,
        "longitude": null,
        "latitude": null,
        "avatar": "https://wegowolf.com/uploads/user/avatar/1735703775-922-imgpsh-fullsize-anim-2-4.png",
        "role": "customer",
        "status": "active",
        "is_new": "yes",
        "available": "yes",
        "gender": "male",
        "balance": "0.00"
    }
}

 ```
